title: SQL: select 5 % 3 crashes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_modulo (id Int32, value Int32 NOT NULL) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_modulo (id, value) VALUES (1, 5), (2, 3), (3, NULL);
SELECT value, value % 3 AS modulo_result FROM test_modulo WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (SELECT value FROM test_modulo WHERE id = 1) % (SELECT value FROM test_modulo WHERE id = 2) AS subquery_modulo;
key_bug_features: SQL modulo operation with invalid syntax
